reason: Task-specific acceptance criteria and non-goals for implementation review.
Review the storage seam, normalization rules, and frontend safety contract against the implementation.
Verify business-language and local-only constraints remain intact.
Verify no account, server-issued identity, or cross-device behavior was introduced.
Verify Wails/Go current-user persistence and excluded settings are preserved.
Verify deterministic local settings and voice-state tests cover the required behavior.
Verify defaults and persisted-free-talk behavior are compatible with later UI flows.
